name: doom-ts
description: DOOM-style Canvas 2D raycaster web game (TypeScript + Vite, Freedoom assets)

scripts.test: npx tsx src/world/world.test.ts && npx tsx src/combat/combat.test.ts && npx tsx src/ai/monster-ai.test.ts && npx tsx src/items/items.test.ts && npx tsx src/weapons/weapons.test.ts && npx tsx src/levels/levels.test.ts && npx tsx src/game/multiplayer.test.ts && npx tsx src/lobby/lobby-client.test.ts && npx tsx src/session/netcode.test.ts && npx tsx src/session/netcode-smooth.test.ts && npx tsx server/coop-complete.test.ts && npx tsx server/deathmatch.test.ts
